mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND r.status = 1 AND r.del_flag = 0 AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND r.status = 1 AND r.del_flag = 0 AND m.menu_type IN (0, 1) ORDER BY m.sort
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE status = 1 AND menu_type IN (0, 1) ORDER BY sort
